fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` specifies a design-space coordinate for a single
variation axis. Provide a span of these values via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> to position a typeface at a specific
location in its variation design space.

The <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate.Axis> tag identifies which axis to set,
and <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate.Value> gives the design-space coordinate
along that axis, clamped to the axis's [Min, Max] range.
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies a design-space coordinate for a single axis of a variable font.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> for the axis to set, for example <c>wght</c> for the weight axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte OpenType tag identifying the variation axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both the axis tag and value are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> with equal axis and value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both values have equal axis tags and coordinate values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two values differ in axis tag or coordinate value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate right);

fields.value: The desired design-space coordinate, clamped to the axis's allowed range.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the design-space coordinate value for the axis.
